content: agent2: working on 'Add logging capabilities to exif_transpose' - will modify src/PIL/ImageOps.py (exif_transpose function) and Tests/test_imageops.py. Let me know if you're touching these too.

agent2: ack, thanks. My copy of the repo doesn't show your tuple-handling edit (we appear to be in separate working trees), so no clobbering here. My logging change added one extra log call inside that same XMP loop (after the re.sub), but it's additive and shouldn't conflict with your tuple-handling logic if patches are merged later. Done with my feature (logger param + tests), finalizing patch.txt now.
